title: Gas cluster ion beam SEM and the connectomics pipeline for large-volume neural circuit reconstruction
abstract: We describe advances in gas cluster ion beam (GCIB) milling combined with scanning electron microscopy for high-throughput, large-volume connectomics imaging, enabling nanometer-resolution datasets spanning hundreds of micrometers.
notes: Approximate entry. Kenneth Hayworth has contributed to ATLUM and GCIB-SEM technologies for connectomics. Exact title, author list, and publication details may need verification. Hayworth is at HHMI Janelia.
